content.title: Collaborative Way of Working
content.content:
# Collaborative Way of Working

## Our Philosophy: Joint Exploration

The PoC is **exploratory in nature**: the goal is to jointly explore feasibility, test assumptions, and learn together—not to deliver a production-ready solution.

Our approach is designed for **co-creation** rather than traditional vendor delivery.

## Collaboration Structure

### Weekly Working Sessions

| Session | Participants | Purpose |
|---------|--------------|--------|
| **Kickoff** (Week 1) | Full teams | Align on scope, success criteria, data access |
| **Technical Sync** (Weekly) | Technical leads | Review progress, troubleshoot blockers |
| **Demo & Feedback** (Bi-weekly) | Business + Technical | Show working prototypes, gather feedback |
| **Steering** (As needed) | Leadership | Escalate decisions, adjust scope |

## Decision-Making Principles

### Shared Ownership

| Decision Type | Who Decides | How |
|---------------|-------------|-----|
| **Scope adjustments** | Joint | Discussed in working sessions |
| **Technical approach** | Systemorph proposes, client approves | Present options with tradeoffs |
| **Priority ranking** | Client | Based on business value |
| **Data model design** | Joint | Systemorph leads, client validates |
| **Success criteria** | Joint | Defined at kickoff, refined iteratively |

## Communication Protocol

| Channel | Use Case | Response Time |
|---------|----------|---------------|
| **Email** | Formal requests, documentation | 24 hours |
| **Teams** | Day-to-day collaboration | Same day |
| **Working sessions** | Demos, decisions, feedback | Scheduled |
| **Shared workspace** | Documents, code, artifacts | Continuous |

## Iterative Approach: Build-Measure-Learn Cycles

| Traditional Approach | Our Approach |
|---------------------|---------------|
| Fixed scope at start | Scope evolves based on findings |
| Acceptance testing at end | Continuous feedback and adjustment |
| Formal change requests | Collaborative scope refinement |
| Vendor delivers, client accepts | Joint problem-solving |

## Documentation Philosophy

Lightweight, learning-focused documentation:

| Document | Purpose | Format |
|----------|---------|--------|
| **Approach summary** | How we solved the problem | 2-3 pages |
| **Results & metrics** | What we achieved | Dashboard + summary |
| **Learnings** | What we discovered | Structured observations |
| **Recommendations** | What to do next | Prioritized list |

## Summary

Our way of working is designed for **successful exploration**:

| Principle | How We Deliver |
|-----------|----------------|
| **Co-creation** | Joint working sessions, shared decisions |
| **Flexibility** | Scope adapts to learnings |
| **Transparency** | Open communication, no surprises |
| **Learning focus** | Document insights, not just outputs |
| **Partnership** | Embedded knowledge transfer |
